creator: taguchi949@gmail.com
text:
how to produce:
% cd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portconfig
% make install
% portconfig -h
Illegal instruction (core dumped)

version:
% freebsd-version  -k
13.3-RELEASE-p1
% freebsd-version -u
13.3-RELEASE-p2

I got this error in following envs:
- amd64 virtual machine on UTM (Apple Silicon Mac/QEMU)
- amd64 virtual machine on UTM (Intel Mac/use Virtualization)

aarch64 virtual machine on UTM (Apple Silicon Mac/Virtualization) is NOT AFFECT.
